title: bryophyllum costantinii
intro: Bryophyllum costantinii, also known as Kalanchoe costantinii, is a succulent plant species belonging to the family Crassulaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Bryophyllum costantinii include its potential to treat various conditions, such as fever, sore throats, and digestive issues, due to its high content of flavonoids and saponins. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, are often used in traditional medicine to harness its therapeutic properties.
